title: Fed official says inflation remains above target
description: A cautious Fed message can reduce near-term rate-cut expectations, raise real-yield pressure, and weigh on long-duration growth equities if not offset by stronger earnings.

title: Public energy data show crude inventory draw
description: A material oil inventory draw can support crude prices. If sustained, it may lift headline inflation expectations and complicate central-bank easing expectations.

title: Search-discovered reports discuss tighter chip export controls
description: Potential chip export restrictions may affect semiconductor revenue, AI supply chains, and geopolitical risk premium. Because this item is search-discovered, it should be cross-checked with official announcements before strong conclusions.
